session_log.summary: 31 T2 tests verified: pipeline error handling (#81 failed stage marks as failed + skips subsequent, #82 auto-retry on low score, #95 SSE error events, #103 rate_limit_warning handler, #105 Content-Type), codebase explorer (#110-113 Stage 0 activation/CodebaseContext/analyzer integration/persistence, #114-118 all 5 tool definitions, #119-121 bounds/timeout/filtering, #124 graceful degradation), GitHub repos (#122-123 linking/unlinking, #125-126 repo list + 5min cache), MCP tools (#151-159 all 9 tool registrations + error handling). Fixed MCP WebSocket endpoint (ws_endpoint signature). Added Toast wiring for rate limit warnings. Pipeline stages now wrapped in individual try/except with skip logic.

Wired github store (selectedRepo/branch) into PromptEdit optimize request, enabling Stage 0 codebase exploration via UI. 3 gaps flagged for coding agent: RepoPickerModal orphan, retryOptimization unused, fetchGitHubAuthStatus not called on init.

Expanded validation (retry): all 114 passing tests verified via git checkpoints across T0-T2. 0 regressions. Code audit completed (clean). Frontend restarted (was down from timeout). Build clean. Cross-feature integration check: history sidebar shows real data, settings panel functional, all API endpoints returning real data (51 optimizations, real scores/frameworks). Visual coherence confirmed.

Wired GitHub state hydration on init (+layout.svelte): fetchGitHubAuthStatus/fetchGitHubRepos/fetchLinkedRepo called on mount to persist GitHub connection across page refreshes. 7 remaining gaps flagged for coding agent (RepoPickerModal orphan, retryOptimization unused, NavigatorFiles hardcoded, fetchHistoryStats/deleteOptimization no UI, fetchProviderDetect/Status unused). Field audit: all 39 OptimizationRecord fields match backend schema. No TS/Pydantic mismatches.

Standard validation (retry completion): all 117 passing tests verified across T0-T2. 0 regressions. Code audit completed in first attempt (clean). Frontend restarted (was down from timeout). Build clean. Cross-feature integration check: history sidebar shows real data (61 optimizations), settings panel functional, stats API returns real aggregated data (7 frameworks, 3 models). Visual coherence confirmed.

next_actions.action: NavigatorFiles.svelte uses hardcoded sampleFiles array — needs to be rewritten to use fetchRepoTree() and fetchFileContent() from client.ts to show actual repo file tree when a GitHub repo is linked.

fetchHistoryStats() in client.ts is defined but has no UI consumer — needs a stats display section (e.g., in NavigatorHistory header or Inspector) showing total_optimizations, average_score, framework_distribution from GET /api/history/stats.
deleteOptimization() in client.ts is defined but has no UI trigger — needs a delete button/icon in NavigatorHistory list items that calls deleteOptimization(id) and refreshes the history list.
